vibe: Authority, Clarity, Functional Beauty. Uncompromisingly clean, corporate, and data-forward. No fluff.

typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-black tracking-tighter text-zinc-900 leading-none
typography.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-zinc-500

components.button_primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-6 py-3 bg-[#0047AB] text-white font-semibold text-sm rounded-md transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-[#003380] hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0047AB] focus:ring-offset-2
components.button_secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-6 py-3 bg-white border border-zinc-300 text-zinc-900 font-semibold text-sm rounded-md transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-zinc-50 hover:border-zinc-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-zinc-200 focus:ring-offset-2
components.card: bg-white border border-zinc-200 transition-all duration-200 hover:border-zinc-300 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)]
components.input: w-full bg-zinc-50 border border-zinc-200 rounded-md px-4 py-3 text-sm focus:bg-white focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0047AB] focus:border-transparent transition-colors
components.badge: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-800
components.header: sticky top-0 z-40 flex h-16 shrink-0 items-center gap-x-4 border-b border-zinc-200 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl px-4 sm:gap-x-6 sm:px-6 lg:px-8

login_background.description: Elegant modern building at Corda Campus
login_background.placement: Left side split screen on Login and Registration pages, full height with a 20% black overlay.

abstract_accent.placement: Used as a subtle banner background in the Student Dashboard welcome card. Set image mix-blend-mode to luminosity or opacity to 10% to keep it strictly professional.

empty_state.placement: Used in empty states (e.g., no pending assignments, no new notices) in a rounded small circular mask or grayscale.

specific_page_guidelines.dashboard_layout: Modular UI layout (Control Room Grid). Left sidebar is dark (Zinc-950) with Zinc-400 links and stark white active states. Main content area is Zinc-50. Widgets have 1px borders, NO default drop shadows.
specific_page_guidelines.login_page: 50/50 split layout. Left side: Campus image (login_background) with the university logo overlay. Right side: Minimalist login form centered vertically. Use 'Cabinet Grotesk' for the 'Welcome Back' header. Input fields must have solid focus states.
specific_page_guidelines.student_dashboard: Top row: 3-4 North Star Metric cards (e.g., 'Attendance', 'Current GPA', 'Due Assignments'). Use the 'abstract_accent' image as a faint background for a 'Welcome' card. Action-Oriented: Next to metrics, show a clear 'Next Action' component.
specific_page_guidelines.notices_viewer: List layout instead of cards for high density. Use 'IBM Plex Sans'. Left align all text. Unread notices get a Cobalt Blue dot indicator (`bg-[#0047AB] w-2 h-2 rounded-full`).
specific_page_guidelines.timetable: Strict table format. Columns represent days, rows represent time slots. Current day/time cell highlighted with a faint blue background (`bg-blue-50/50`). No complex card nesting.
specific_page_guidelines.admin_dashboard: Focus on data density. Use 'Phosphor Icons' (Duotone) for quick recognition. Add a top widget for 'Open Queries' and 'Low Attendance Flags'. Same Swiss high-contrast aesthetic.
specific_page_guidelines.forms_and_submissions: All forms (Complaint, Assignment upload) must use Shadcn customized inputs. Drag & drop zones for assignments should have a dashed border (`border-dashed border-2 border-zinc-300`) and a slight hover lift.

accessibility_and_testing: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, tabs, submit actions) MUST have a `data-testid` attribute. Hover states must be visible. Ensure focus states use `focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0047AB]`.
instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use standard Shadcn card shadows. Use the flat, bordered style (`border-zinc-200`) and only apply shadow on hover.
Install and use `@phosphor-icons/react` for all icons.
Import 'Cabinet Grotesk' (headings) and 'IBM Plex Sans' (body) via Google Fonts or Fontshare, and apply them in tailwind config.
Do NOT center align dashboard elements unless specified; stick to left alignment for clean data presentation.
Always use the provided media URLs, NEVER use placeholders.
